s: In 1982, Mike Smithson suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.010, WHIP 1.370, SO 24, WAR 0.500.
In 1983, Mike Smithson suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.910, WHIP 1.360, SO 135, WAR 4.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (TEX -> MIN).
In 1984, Mike Smithson suited up for MIN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.680, WHIP 1.190, SO 144, WAR 2.700. Notable context: Joined MIN.
In 1985, Mike Smithson suited up for MIN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.410, WHIP 1.330, SO 127, WAR 3.200.
In 1986, Mike Smithson suited up for MIN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.770, WHIP 1.470, SO 114, WAR 1.900.
In 1987, Mike Smithson suited up for MIN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.940, WHIP 1.500, SO 53, WAR 0.500.
Changed teams after the previous season (MIN -> BOS).
In 1988, Mike Smithson suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.970, WHIP 1.470, SO 73, WAR -0.600. Notable context: Joined BOS.
In 1989, Mike Smithson suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.950, WHIP 1.430, SO 61, WAR -0.300.
